criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on various app stores.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, other app marketplaces

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across all platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, other app marketplaces

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: Availability and sophistication of AI-powered features such as personalized recommendations, voice assistants, and music discovery tools.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, tech reviews, user feedback

criteria.name: Music Library Size
criteria.description: Total number of songs and albums available in the app's library.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, design, and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert opinions

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Cost of premium subscription plans, if applicable.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability across different platforms such as iOS, Android, Web, etc.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Integration with Other Services
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with other services and devices, such as smart speakers, social media, etc.

criteria.name: Offline Features
criteria.description: Availability and quality of offline features, such as downloading music for offline listening.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and new feature releases.
criteria.sources: App store listings, official app blogs
